THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SHERIE MARTINEZ MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Petitioner's unopposed motion to compel arbitration is granted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
